content.text: I'll help you check your MySQL databases on Mittwald. Let me start by listing your projects and then the MySQL databases.

input.description: List Mittwald projects and MySQL databases
input.prompt:
Use the mcp__mittwald__mittwald_project_list_projects tool to list all projects, then use mcp__mittwald__mittwald_database_list_mysql_databases to list all MySQL databases. Return the results in a clear format showing:
1. All projects with their IDs
2. All MySQL databases with their details (name, status, server, etc.)

Make both tool calls and return the complete results.

content.text:
Use the mcp__mittwald__mittwald_project_list_projects tool to list all projects, then use mcp__mittwald__mittwald_database_list_mysql_databases to list all MySQL databases. Return the results in a clear format showing:
1. All projects with their IDs
2. All MySQL databases with their details (name, status, server, etc.)

Make both tool calls and return the complete results.
